revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{documentation subpage}} {{high-use}} ==Description== {{fb-rt|nation|variant|size=optional|name=optional}} Produces a flag icon attached to a wikilinked national football team article. Similar to [[Template:Fb]], but puts the flag icon on the right side of the team name instead of to the left. This is useful when formatting match results. ;Parameters *''nation'' — Use either the name of the nation or the three-letter country code as used by [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA]] *''variant'' (optional) — Specifies an alternate (historical) flag to use. This parameter is documented by the appropriate template in [[:Category:Country data templates]]. *''size'' (optional) — Can be used to change the flag icon size (use sparingly!) *''name'' (optional) — Can be used to change the wikilink display text ==Examples== *{{fb-rt|Brazil}} → {{fb-rt|Brazil}} *{{fb-rt|ENG}} → {{fb-rt|ENG}} *{{fb-rt|Italy|1861}} → {{fb-rt|Italy|1861}} *{{fb-rt|GER|name=GER}} → {{fb-rt|GER|name=GER}} ==See also== *[[Template:fb]] — for rendering the flag on the left *[[:en:Template:Fb-big|Template:Fb-big]] — for rendering a larger flag, with the team name underneath the flag *[[:Category:National association football teams]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Association football flag templates]] [[Category:Flag template system]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{documentation subpage}} {{high-use}} ==Description== {{fb-rt|nation|variant|size=optional|name=optional}} Produces a flag icon attached to a wikilinked national football team article. Similar to [[Template:Fb]], but puts the flag icon on the right side of the team name instead of to the left. This is useful when formatting match results. ;Parameters *''nation'' — Use either the name of the nation or the three-letter country code as used by [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA]] *''variant'' (optional) — Specifies an alternate (historical) flag to use. This parameter is documented by the appropriate template in [[:Category:Country data templates]]. *''size'' (optional) — Can be used to change the flag icon size (use sparingly!) *''name'' (optional) — Can be used to change the wikilink display text ==Examples== *{{fb-rt|Brazil}} → {{fb-rt|Brazil}} *{{fb-rt|ENG}} → {{fb-rt|ENG}} *{{fb-rt|Italy|1861}} → {{fb-rt|Italy|1861}} *{{fb-rt|GER|name=GER}} → {{fb-rt|GER|name=GER}} ==See also== *[[Template:fb]] — for rendering the flag on the left *[[:en:Template:Fb-big|Template:Fb-big]] — for rendering a larger flag, with the team name underneath the flag *[[:Category:National association football teams]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Association football flag templates]] [[Category:Flag template system]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{documentation subpage}} {{high-use}} ==Description== {{fb-rt|nation|variant|size=optional|name=optional}} Produces a flag icon attached to a wikilinked national football team article. Similar to [[Template:Fb]], but puts the flag icon on the right side of the team name instead of to the left. This is useful when formatting match results. ;Parameters *''nation'' — Use either the name of the nation or the three-letter country code as used by [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA]] *''variant'' (optional) — Specifies an alternate (historical) flag to use. This parameter is documented by the appropriate template in [[:Category:Country data templates]]. *''size'' (optional) — Can be used to change the flag icon size (use sparingly!) *''name'' (optional) — Can be used to change the wikilink display text ==Examples== *{{fb-rt|Brazil}} → {{fb-rt|Brazil}} *{{fb-rt|ENG}} → {{fb-rt|ENG}} *{{fb-rt|Italy|1861}} → {{fb-rt|Italy|1861}} *{{fb-rt|GER|name=GER}} → {{fb-rt|GER|name=GER}} ==See also== *[[Template:fb]] — for rendering the flag on the left *[[:en:Template:Fb-big|Template:Fb-big]] — for rendering a larger flag, with the team name underneath the flag *[[:Category:National association football teams]] {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Association football flag templates]] [[Category:Flag template system]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fb-rt%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{documentation subpage}} {{high-use}} ==Description== {{fb-rt|nation|variant|size=optional|name=optional}} Produces a flag icon attached to a wikilinked national football team article. Similar to [[Template:Fb]], but puts the flag icon on the right side of the team name instead of to the left. This is useful when formatting match results. ;Parameters *''nation'' — Use either the name of the nation or the three-letter country code as used by [[:en:List of FIFA country codes|FIFA]] *''variant'' (optional) — Specifies an alternate (historical) flag to use. This parameter is documented by the appropriate template in [[:Category:Country data templates]]. *''size'' (optional) — Can be used to change the flag icon size (use sparingly!) *''name'' (optional) — Can be used to change the wikilink display text ==Examples== *{{fb-rt|Brazil}} → {{fb-rt|Brazil}} *{{fb-rt|ENG}} → {{fb-rt|ENG}} *{{fb-rt|Italy|1861}} → {{fb-rt|Italy|1861}} *{{fb-rt|GER|name=GER}} → {{fb-rt|GER|name=GER}} ==See also== *[[Template:fb]] — for rendering the flag on the left *[[:en:Template:Fb-big|Template:Fb-big]] — for rendering a larger flag, with the team name underneath the flag *[[:Category:National association football teams]] {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Association football flag templates]] [[Category:Flag template system]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
